scripts.dev: npm -w @smartmarket/api run dev & npm -w @smartmarket/web run dev
scripts.build: npm -w @smartmarket/types run build && npm -w @smartmarket/config run build && npm -w @smartmarket/polymarket-sdk run build && npm -w @smartmarket/api run build && npm -w @smartmarket/web run build
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm -w @smartmarket/api run start" "npm -w @smartmarket/web run start"
